HGSS.365.0000:
Alas!
You’ve found me...\f
My peace and quiet to heal myself from
the exhaustion of standing in the\r
spotlight has been exposed!\f
HGSS.365.0001:
What? You are not the media?
Then you must be one of my fans.\f
Why didn’t you say so?
Giggle...\f
You can keep it to yourself that
I’m here, right?\f
I’ll give you this for that!\f
HGSS.365.0002:
It contains Steel Wing!\f
I remember I was wearing a dress
inspired by this move on my\r
debut stage...\f
Alas...
Being a legendary Idol is so demanding.\f
I’ve been retired for some time, but
people never stop chasing after me...\r
like you!
